jakarta.faces.view.facelets
 

  • Uses of ComponentConfig in jakarta.faces.view.facelets

    Methods in jakarta.faces.view.facelets that return ComponentConfig
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    ComponentConfig
    ComponentHandler.getComponentConfig()
    Returns the component configuration, a component-type/renderer-type pair.
    Constructors in jakarta.faces.view.facelets with parameters of type ComponentConfig
    Modifier
    Constructor
    Description
     
    ComponentHandler(ComponentConfig config)
    Leverage the TagHandlerDelegateFactory provided by the implementation to create an instance of TagHandlerDelegate designed for use with ComponentHandler.
